'''âp-th-zh''' ('''shapathazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nail|nail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nail|nail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-th-zh
|-
! Lemma
| shapathazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipathazh|thipathazh]] || [[word:jipathazh|jipathazh]] || [[word:shipathazh|shipathazh]] || [[word:kipathazh|kipathazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupathazh|thuthupathazh]] || [[word:jujupathazh|jujupathazh]] || [[word:shushupathazh|shushupathazh]] || [[word:kukupathazh|kukupathazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupathazh|thupathazh]] || [[word:jupathazh|jupathazh]] || [[word:shupathazh|shupathazh]] || [[word:kupathazh|kupathazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupathazh|thupathazh]] || [[word:jupathazh|jupathazh]] || [[word:shupathazh|shupathazh]] || [[word:kupathazh|kupathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepathazh|thepathazh]] || [[word:jepathazh|jepathazh]] || [[word:shepathazh|shepathazh]] || [[word:kepathazh|kepathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopathazh|thothopathazh]] || [[word:jojopathazh|jojopathazh]] || [[word:shoshopathazh|shoshopathazh]] || [[word:kokopathazh|kokopathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopathazh|thopathazh]] || [[word:jopathazh|jopathazh]] || [[word:shopathazh|shopathazh]] || [[word:kopathazh|kopathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopathazh|thopathazh]] || [[word:jopathazh|jopathazh]] || [[word:shopathazh|shopathazh]] || [[word:kopathazh|kopathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpathazh|thĂŠpathazh]] || [[word:jĂŠpathazh|jĂŠpathazh]] || [[word:shĂŠpathazh|shĂŠpathazh]] || [[word:kĂŠpathazh|kĂŠpathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapathazh|thathapathazh]] || [[word:jajapathazh|jajapathazh]] || [[word:shashapathazh|shashapathazh]] || [[word:kakapathazh|kakapathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapathazh|thapathazh]] || [[word:japathazh|japathazh]] || [[word:shapathazh|shapathazh]] || [[word:kapathazh|kapathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapathazh|thapathazh]] || [[word:japathazh|japathazh]] || [[word:shapathazh|shapathazh]] || [[word:kapathazh|kapathazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapathazh|shapathazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapathazh|goshapathazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapathazh|gokishapathazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapathazhnĂŒ|shapathazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapathazhnknĂŒ|goshapathazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapathazhnĂŒ|gokishapathazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapathazhshĂ«|shapathazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkshĂ«|goshapathazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapathazhshĂ«|gokishapathazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapathazhro|shapathazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkro|goshapathazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapathazhro|gokishapathazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapathazhmu|shapathazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkmu|goshapathazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapathazhmu|gokishapathazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapathazhsher|shapathazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapathazhnksher|goshapathazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapathazhsher|gokishapathazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapathazhng|shapathazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkng|goshapathazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapathazhng|gokishapathazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapathazhya|shapathazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkya|goshapathazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapathazhya|gokishapathazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapathazhyam|shapathazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkyam|goshapathazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapathazhyam|gokishapathazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapathazhnĂŒshĂ«|shapathazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapathazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapathazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapathazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapathazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapathazhnĂŒro|shapathazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapathazhnknĂŒro|goshapathazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapathazhnĂŒro|gokishapathazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapathazhnĂŒmu|shapathazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapathazhnknĂŒmu|goshapathazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapathazhnĂŒmu|gokishapathazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapathazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shapathazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapathazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapathazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapathazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapathazhshĂ«ro|shapathazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkshĂ«ro|goshapathazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapathazhshĂ«ro|gokishapathazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapathazhshĂ«mu|shapathazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkshĂ«mu|goshapathazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapathazhshĂ«mu|gokishapathazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapathazhronĂŒ|shapathazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkronĂŒ|goshapathazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapathazhronĂŒ|gokishapathazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapathazhroshĂ«|shapathazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkroshĂ«|goshapathazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapathazhroshĂ«|gokishapathazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapathazhromu|shapathazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkromu|goshapathazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapathazhromu|gokishapathazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapathazhmunĂŒ|shapathazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkmunĂŒ|goshapathazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapathazhmunĂŒ|gokishapathazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapathazhmushĂ«|shapathazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkmushĂ«|goshapathazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapathazhmushĂ«|gokishapathazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapathazhmuro|shapathazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapathazhnkmuro|goshapathazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapathazhmuro|gokishapathazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a27364f}}
